pr.title: Draft: SOTA+ TTT + RoPE50K + EMA + Curriculum (pending H100 run)

output.summary: Extends PR#198’s SmearGate stack with RoPE50K, LAWA-EMA plus curriculum scheduling, and full-model SGD test-time training before scoring.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Full-model SGD test-time training on validation data before scoring (TTT adaptation).
techniques: RoPE base 50K for smoother long-context interpolation
LAWA-EMA with curriculum switch (seq1024→2048) for steadier convergence
Full-model SGD TTT adaptation on validation data before scoring
